notes: Changed Pathmark Online sync-sheet handling so it searches for an existing Pathmark Sync file and no longer automatically creates a new spreadsheet on every login when one cannot be found.
Newly created sync sheets are tagged with Drive appProperties so future sessions can re-find them under the narrow drive.file permission.

Added optional editable starter examples for ordinary Areas, routines, goals and action blocks, including sleep, meals, strength training, running, violin practice, sketching and gradual running-distance goals.
Added online validation for date and time fields before saving goals, routines, actions and routine activities.
Adjusted the online Tasklist page to behave more like the desktop page: name the list, tick goal actions and routine activities, preview the selected rows, then download the printable tasklist.
